response.overview: Re.azioni is an experimental short film made from AAMOD archive footage. The film is based on a dialogue between two types of images: brightly colored nature documentaries and black-and-white shots of hands and faces. Re.azioni is a film about creation and perception, yet leaves open many avenues of interpretation. Beyond the meanings everyone can find, it is an invitation to contemplation, listening, and feeling.
response.title: re.azioni
